title: Top Gun: Maverick
writer: Ehren Kruger and Eric Warren Singer and Christopher McQuarrie
logline: Maverick returns to Top Gun to train elite pilots for a dangerous mission, confronting his past while preparing the next generation for an impossible strike against an enemy uranium facility.
antagonistOrConflict: The impossible mission parameters and Maverick's unresolved past with Rooster (Goose's son)
tone: Heroic, nostalgic, high-stakes with emotional depth
themes: The evolution of warfare and technology

actBreaks.description: Maverick is removed from the mission after his confrontation with Cyclone, marking the end of the training phase and his apparent failure.

validation.ruling: Scene 121 ends Act 1 as Maverick begins briefing the pilots on the impossible mission parameters, fundamentally shifting from training exercises to preparing for a real deadly mission with specific altitude and speed requirements.

actBreaks.description: The pilots launch from the carrier for the actual mission, transitioning from preparation to execution of the dangerous strike.

validation.ruling: Scene 238 ends Act 2 with Rooster struggling in his cockpit, unable to push the throttle harder as the mission falls apart and Payback tells him they're not okay, marking the transition into the final act's life-or-death stakes.

naturalStructure.structuralPersonality: This is a legacy sequel that masterfully balances nostalgia with forward momentum. The structure mirrors the original Top Gun but deepens it—where the first film was about proving oneself, this is about proving oneself worthy of passing the torch. The training sequences aren't just spectacle; they're Maverick working through his guilt over Goose's death through his relationship with Rooster. The script uses a classic three-act structure but with sophisticated emotional layering, where each dogfight and training exercise serves the larger arc of Maverick learning to let go and trust the next generation.
naturalStructure.pacingNotes: The pacing accelerates through distinct phases: the Darkstar opening (scenes 1-47) establishes stakes and gets Maverick to Top Gun quickly; the training section (scenes 69-145) builds relationships and tension through increasingly difficult exercises; the mission preparation and execution (scenes 213-329) maintains relentless momentum. The script uses short, punchy scenes averaging 1.1 pages, creating a kinetic rhythm that mirrors the aerial sequences.

incitingIncident.description: Admiral Cain reviews Maverick's file, noting his 30+ years of service and combat achievements, then questions why he remains a Captain instead of advancing to Admiral or Senator rank.
incitingIncident.sceneHeading: 47 INT. HANGAR OFFICE - DAY - MOMENTS LATER 47 47

validation.ruling: Scene 40 shatters Maverick's ordinary world when Admiral Cain tells him 'The future is coming. And you're not in it' and orders his escort off the base, forcing Maverick into the new conflict that drives the entire story.

midpoint.description: Warlock announces to the class that the mission has been moved up one week because the uranium plant will be operational sooner than expected, with no pilot having successfully completed the training course.

validation.ruling: Scene 145 serves as the midpoint when Warlock announces the mission has been moved up one week, creating a point of no return that shifts the pilots from reactive training to proactive preparation for an impossible mission.

climax.description: Maverick tells Rooster they must eject because they can't outrun their pursuer, but when Maverick orders ejection, Rooster's ejection handle doesn't work, leaving them trapped as the enemy fighter attacks.

validation.ruling: Scene 308 is the climax where Maverick and Rooster face their ultimate confrontation with the fifth-generation fighter, with their ejection seat failing and Maverick realizing they're doomed before the enemy aircraft explodes.

scenes.heading: 1 EXT. CARRIER DECK - DAWN 1 1
scenes.summary: Fighter jets roll on a carrier deck at dawn as flight crews prepare aircraft for launch, with jets taking off into the sky with blazing afterburners.

scenes.heading: EXT. CARRIER ELEVATOR - DAWN A3
scenes.summary: An F-18 rises on a carrier elevator as Maverick holds his helmet and says 'Talk to me, Goose' before being called by an unseen man.

scenes.heading: INT. AIRSTREAM - DAY A12
scenes.summary: Maverick wakes up in his Airstream trailer, gets up, and starts his coffee machine to begin his day.

scenes.heading: 12 INT. HANGAR HOME - DUSK 12 12
scenes.summary: Maverick exits his trailer with breakfast to reveal his hangar home containing motorcycles, a vintage car, and a P-51 Mustang, then eats alone at a table with an empty chair.

scenes.heading: 13 EXT. HANGAR - DESERT ROAD 13 13
scenes.summary: Maverick speeds away from his hangar on his motorcycle, pushing the machine to its limit.

scenes.heading: 14 EXT. CHINA LAKE TEST FACILITY - CALIFORNIA - DUSK 14 14
scenes.summary: Maverick arrives at the China Lake Test Facility where armed guards recognize him and wave him through the checkpoint without stopping.

scenes.heading: 15 INT. TEST HANGAR - DUSK 15 15
scenes.summary: Maverick enters the test hangar to find the Darkstar prototype jet but discovers the engineers and techs standing motionless, with Hondo informing him they've been ordered to stand down and scrap the aircraft.
scenes.turningPointNote: The mission Maverick came to complete is being cancelled, setting up his defiant choice to fly anyway

scenes.heading: 16 INT. SUIT-UP ROOM - TEST FACILITY - DUSK 16 16
scenes.summary: Maverick runs on a treadmill in a pressure suit while Hondo tries to dissuade him from the dangerous test flight, warning the aircraft hasn't passed Mach 8.5 and is months from Mach 10.

scenes.heading: INT. LONG CORRIDOR - DAY AA17
scenes.summary: Dozens of Darkstar team members line a corridor in silence as Maverick, suited up and carrying oxygen, walks past them with Hondo reminding him the contact threshold is Mach 10.

scenes.heading: EXT. TEST HANGAR - NIGHT B17
scenes.summary: The Darkstar aircraft is rolled from the hangar onto the tarmac.

scenes.heading: 17 EXT. DARKSTAR HANGAR - NIGHT 17 17
scenes.summary: Maverick performs a walk-around inspection of the Darkstar prototype, stroking the nose of the aircraft while engineers watch.

scenes.heading: 18 INT. DARKSTAR COCKPIT - NIGHT 18 18
scenes.summary: Maverick straps into the Darkstar cockpit as techs secure him and attach cables, with Hondo warning him about the Mach 10 threshold and expressing concern about Maverick's determined look.

scenes.heading: INT. MISSION CONTROL - NIGHT - MOMENTS LATER A20
scenes.summary: Hondo and the engineering team monitor Maverick from mission control as they conduct radio checks and prepare for the test flight.

scenes.heading: INT. CONTROL ROOM A21
scenes.summary: The engineers give thumbs up for taxi clearance as Hondo radios approval to Maverick, who responds affectionately to the aircraft.

scenes.heading: 22 INT/EXT. COCKPIT - NIGHT 22 22
scenes.summary: Maverick conducts extensive pre-flight checks over radio with mission control, reporting on engine temperatures, batteries, cabin pressure, and various aircraft systems.

scenes.heading: 23 EXT. GATEHOUSE - NIGHT 23 23
scenes.summary: Rear Admiral Cain arrives at the facility gatehouse just as Darkstar roars overhead with a deafening sound, causing his driver to recoil from the dust blast.

scenes.heading: 24 INT. DARKSTAR - NIGHT 24 24
scenes.summary: Maverick climbs skyward in the Darkstar as the ground recedes behind him.

scenes.heading: 25 INT. MISSION CONTROL - MINUTES LATER - NIGHT 25 25
scenes.summary: Mission control clears Maverick to increase to Mach 3.5 above 60,000 feet, which he acknowledges over radio.

scenes.heading: INT. DARKSTAR COCKPIT A26
scenes.summary: Maverick speaks affectionately to the aircraft, calling the speed 'just a walk in the park' for it, then pushes the throttle forward.

scenes.heading: INT. MISSION CONTROL B26
scenes.summary: Admiral Cain enters mission control and confronts Hondo about being early, demanding an explanation while Hondo awkwardly radios Maverick about a supposed storm front.

scenes.heading: 26 INT. COCKPIT - NIGHT 26 26
scenes.summary: Maverick lies over radio, claiming the storm is breaking up and that he'll buy beers tonight.

scenes.heading: 27 INT. MISSION CONTROL - NIGHT 27 27
scenes.summary: Cain orders Maverick to land, but Maverick announces he's transitioning to scramjet, causing the main engines to shut down before the scramjet bursts to life and rockets the aircraft into the upper atmosphere.
scenes.turningPointNote: Maverick directly defies Cain's order to land and commits to the dangerous high-speed test

scenes.heading: 29 INT. MISSION CONTROL - NIGHT 29 29
scenes.summary: The engineers monitor with nervous tension as Hondo tries to relay Cain's order to land, but Maverick's radio transmission breaks up due to Earth's curvature.

scenes.heading: INT. DARKSTAR - NIGHT A30
scenes.summary: Maverick deliberately simulates radio breakup while actually maintaining clear communication, ignoring Hondo's repeated orders to land as his smile turns to pure focus.

scenes.heading: INT. MISSION CONTROL - NIGHT B30
scenes.summary: Hondo apologizes to Cain as the engineers report Maverick reaching Mach 7 and pushing toward 8, with flight data streaming in successfully.

scenes.heading: 31 INT. MISSION CONTROL - NIGHT 31 31
scenes.summary: The engineers report Maverick reaching Mach 9 as everyone sweats from the tension of entering unknown territory, with Hondo noting he's the fastest man alive while Cain acknowledges this changes nothing.

scenes.heading: 32 INT. COCKPIT - NIGHT 32 32
scenes.summary: Maverick whispers 'Talk to me, Goose' and gently nudges the stick forward, pushing the aircraft beyond its tested limits.

scenes.heading: EXT. SATELLITE ALTITUDE - DAY A33
scenes.summary: The Darkstar leaves a contrail in a wide arch across the western United States as viewed from space.

scenes.heading: 33 INT. MISSION CONTROL - NIGHT 33 33
scenes.summary: Engineers celebrate as they report Maverick passing Mach 9.2, with Cain acknowledging Maverick's courage by calling him a 'stick-jockey' with balls.

scenes.heading: 34 INT. COCKPIT 34 34
scenes.summary: Maverick jams the throttle all the way forward with complete resolve as the gauges roll past Mach 9.4.

scenes.heading: 35 INT. MISSION CONTROL - NIGHT 35 35
scenes.summary: Mission control reports Maverick approaching high-hypersonic speeds at Mach 9.5 and 130,000 feet as surface temperature warnings appear, with Hondo tensely offering Cain coffee.

scenes.heading: 36 INT. COCKPIT - NIGHT 36 36
scenes.summary: The scramjet engine screams as plasma rips off the nose, casting purple light in the cockpit while Maverick reaches Mach 10 and pushes further despite windshield hot caution warnings.

scenes.heading: 37 INT. MISSION CONTROL - NIGHT 37 37
scenes.summary: The mission control team cheers as Maverick hits Mach 10, with data streaming in successfully, but Hondo knows his friend well enough to worry that Maverick won't stop there.

scenes.heading: 38 INT. COCKPIT - NIGHT 38 38
scenes.summary: Maverick pushes the aircraft to Mach 10.2, encouraging it to go further, but the Darkstar jolts violently as warning lights and alarms activate, then he's slammed against the canopy.
scenes.turningPointNote: The aircraft breaks apart at extreme speed, apparently killing Maverick and ending his test pilot career

scenes.heading: 39 INT. MISSION CONTROL - NIGHT 39 39
scenes.summary: All screens in mission control go dark and flight data vanishes as Hondo calls for Maverick over radio, receiving only static in response.

scenes.heading: 44 EXT. TRUCK STOP - DAWN 44 44
scenes.summary: Trucks pass by a country highway truck stop at dawn with a tumbleweed rolling past.

scenes.heading: INT. TRUCK STOP - DAWN A46
scenes.summary: Maverick enters a truck stop dazed and parched, carrying his helmet and stick, asking a waitress for water and where he is, with a kid responding 'Earth' before helicopters arrive.
scenes.turningPointNote: Maverick survived the crash and is about to be retrieved, revealing he's alive but facing consequences

scenes.heading: 46 EXT. TEST HANGAR - DAY 46 46
scenes.summary: A Navy rescue helicopter lands at the test hangar as two MPs escort Maverick, who glances back at the departing helicopter before walking away to face consequences.

scenes.heading: INT. LONG CORRIDOR - DAY B47
scenes.summary: Maverick enters a corridor followed by MPs and encounters the Darkstar team members who offer mixed emotions of pride and uncertainty about whether their achievement was worth the cost.

scenes.heading: 47 INT. HANGAR OFFICE - DAY - MOMENTS LATER 47 47
scenes.summary: Admiral Cain reviews Maverick's file, noting his 30+ years of service and combat achievements, then questions why he remains a Captain instead of advancing to Admiral or Senator rank.
scenes.turningPointNote: Cain confronts Maverick about his career stagnation and sets up his reassignment to Top Gun

scenes.heading: 49 EXT. POINT LOMA - DAY 49 49
scenes.summary: An aerial view reveals North Island Naval Air Station at Point Loma as the Top Gun theme music begins.

scenes.heading: 50 EXT. NAVAL AIR STATION NORTH ISLAND, CORONADO - DAY 50 50
scenes.summary: Maverick rides his motorcycle down a taxiway as an F-18 Super Hornet takes off, watching it soar in disbelief that he's back at Top Gun.

scenes.heading: EXT. AIRBASE ENTRANCE A51
scenes.summary: Maverick stops to look at an old F-14 Tomcat on display with his faded name and three kill silhouettes marked underneath the canopy.

scenes.heading: 51 EXT. OFFICERS’ BUILDING 51 51
scenes.summary: Maverick enters the North Island Naval Air Station headquarters building.

scenes.heading: 52 INT. HALLWAY - DUSK 52 52
scenes.summary: Maverick walks through a hallway lined with photos of Iceman, Slider, and Goose, stopping to stare at a prominent photo of Admiral Iceman before being called by an aide.

scenes.heading: 53 INT. OFFICERS’ BOARDROOM - DUSK 53 53
scenes.summary: Admiral Cyclone introduces himself as the Airboss alongside Admiral Warlock, then briefs Maverick on a classified mission involving surveillance images of industrial buildings in a forbidding valley.
scenes.turningPointNote: The impossible mission is revealed to Maverick, establishing the central conflict

scenes.heading: 54 EXT. “THE HARD DECK” BAR - DUSK - ESTABLISHING 54 54
scenes.summary: The Hard Deck bar is established as an old yacht club converted into a Naval history shrine with help wanted signs.

scenes.heading: 55 INT. HARD DECK - BAR AREA - DUSK 55 55
scenes.summary: Maverick sits at the Hard Deck bar texting with Iceman about the mission and a kid not being ready, then encounters Penny Benjamin, the bartender who recognizes him immediately.

scenes.heading: INT. HARD DECK - POOL TABLE - DUSK A56
scenes.summary: Young pilots including Hangman, Phoenix, Payback, Fanboy, and Coyote gather around a pool table, with Phoenix introducing the others and making cutting remarks about Hangman's air-to-air kill being against an outdated aircraft.

scenes.heading: INT. HARD DECK - BAR AREA - NIGHT B56
scenes.summary: Hangman approaches the bar for drinks as Phoenix calls out to Rooster Bradshaw, who enters and surprises her with his presence, causing Maverick to freeze upon hearing the name.
scenes.turningPointNote: Rooster's arrival brings Maverick face-to-face with his unresolved past with Goose's son

scenes.heading: INT. HARD DECK - POOL AREA - DUSK C56
scenes.summary: At the Hard Deck pool area, Hangman greets Rooster with a beer and needles him about team leadership, leading to a tense face-to-face confrontation where Hangman suggests anyone following Rooster will run out of fuel.

scenes.heading: INT. HARD DECK - BAR AREA - NIGHT D56
scenes.summary: Penny tells Maverick his card has been declined at the bar, then someone unplugs the music and starts playing piano - Rooster takes over the piano as the crowd's reaction shifts from skeptical to engaged.

scenes.heading: 56 EXT. REAR OF HARD DECK - NIGHT 56 56
scenes.summary: The pilots force Maverick out the back door of the Hard Deck into the sand as the crowd chants 'overboard,' with Hangman thanking him for the beers before they all head back inside.

scenes.heading: 57 INT. HARD DECK - BAR AREA - NIGHT 57 57
scenes.summary: Inside the Hard Deck, Hangman celebrates with the other pilots but his smile fades when Rooster begins playing 'Great Balls of Fire' and wins over the crowd.

scenes.heading: 58 EXT. HARD DECK - NIGHT 58 58
scenes.summary: Outside brushing sand off himself, Maverick hears the song and turns to look back at the bar, seeing Rooster through the windows at the piano.

scenes.heading: 59 INT. HARD DECK BAR - NIGHT 59 59
scenes.summary: Rooster leads the entire bar in singing 'Great Balls of Fire' while Maverick sees him as a dead ringer for Goose, and Penny notices the significance of this moment for Maverick.
scenes.turningPointNote: Maverick confronts the painful reality of Rooster's resemblance to his dead father Goose

scenes.heading: 62 EXT. TOP GUN TARMAC - MORNING 62 62
scenes.summary: At Top Gun the next morning, Hondo arrives and tells Maverick he was inches from a clean getaway to Reno and a waiting woman, but came to support Maverick who needs at least one person on his side.

scenes.heading: 69 INT. TOP GUN DETACHMENT HANGAR - DAY 69 69
scenes.summary: In the Top Gun hangar, Admiral Warlock briefs the elite pilots including Rooster, Phoenix, and Hangman, explaining they're facing a new enemy fighter threat unlike their previous close air support missions.
scenes.turningPointNote: The mission parameters and enemy threat are officially revealed to the pilots

scenes.heading: 72 EXT. SKIES ABOVE DESERT - SORTIE 1 - DAY 72 72
scenes.summary: Two F-18s roar past in an explosion of sound above the desert.

scenes.heading: 73 INT. MAVERICK/ROOSTER/PAYBACK F-18S - INTERCUT - SORTIE 1 73 73
scenes.summary: Rooster flies in formation with Payback and Fanboy as Maverick's voice comes over the radio welcoming them to basic fighter maneuvers, while they search the empty sky and radar for him.

scenes.heading: INT. MAVERICK'S F-18 - SORTIE 1 - (OLD SC73) A77
scenes.summary: Maverick explains over radio that the exercise is dogfighting in a ten-mile radius with a five thousand foot hard deck, and they must shoot him down as a team.

scenes.heading: INT. ROOSTER'S F-18 - SORTIE 1 - (OLD SC73) B77
scenes.summary: When Payback asks what happens if they don't shoot Maverick down, Maverick responds that he'll shoot back.

scenes.heading: INT. READY ROOM - (OLD SC71) C77
scenes.summary: In the ready room, pilots not flying listen to the exercise over radio as Maverick explains the rules, while Hangman questions who Maverick thinks he is.

scenes.heading: INT. PAYBACK/FANBOY/ROOSTER/MAV F-18S - SORTIE 1 - (OLD SC73) D77
scenes.summary: During the dogfight, Rooster and Fanboy search for Maverick while Payback proposes a bet of two hundred pushups for whoever gets shot down first, which Maverick accepts before declaring 'Fight's on.'

scenes.heading: INT.READY ROOM - DAY E77
scenes.summary: The pilots in the ready room listen to the dogfight, with Hangman enjoying the action and a close-up on Phoenix.

scenes.heading: INT. PAYBACK/FANBOY F-18 - SORTIE 1 - (OLD SCA75) F77
scenes.summary: During intense aerial maneuvering, Payback tries to get guns on Maverick while telling Rooster to hang in there as they come to help him.

scenes.heading: INT. F-18S - INTERCUT - SORTIE 1 - (OLD SCC75) G77
scenes.summary: Rooster hears the kill alarm and angrily rips off his oxygen mask as Maverick announces guns kill on Rooster, while Payback and Fanboy realize they're too late to help.

scenes.heading: 77 INT. READY ROOM - HANGAR - DAY 77 77
scenes.summary: The class waits in tense silence as the next pilots are called up, while Payback and Fanboy watch Rooster doing pushups outside and Phoenix observes that it reveals something about Rooster's character.

scenes.heading: 78 EXT. TARMAC - UNDER JETS - DAY 78 78
scenes.summary: Fritz, Harvard and Yale find Rooster sweating through pushups with Hondo counting, and they joke with him before Harvard takes a selfie as they head to their jets.

scenes.heading: INT/EXT. MAVERICK’S F-18 / H-YALE’S F-18 - SORTIE 1A MONTAGE A79
scenes.summary: Maverick's jet soars into frame and instantly locks target on Harvard and Yale's jet.

scenes.heading: 79 EXT. TARMAC - UNDER JETS - DAY 79 79
scenes.summary: Fritz, Harvard and Yale are now doing pushups themselves, sweating as Hondo continues counting past one hundred twenty.

scenes.heading: 80 INT. READY ROOM - DAY 80 80
scenes.summary: In the ready room, Phoenix asks Rooster if he's okay and he takes a long time to answer yes, before Phoenix, Bob and Hangman are called up together, neither Phoenix nor Hangman wanting to fly with the other.

scenes.heading: 81 EXT. SKIES ABOVE DESERT - SORTIE 2 - DAY 81 81
scenes.summary: Two more F-18s roar toward camera in formation with Hangman leading and Phoenix on his right wing.

scenes.heading: 82 INT. HANGMAN’S F-18/INT. PHOENIX/BOB’S F-18 - SORTIE 2 82 82
scenes.summary: During level flight, Hangman needles Bob about his call-sign while Phoenix warns Bob not to take the bait and reveals that Rooster gave Hangman his call-sign, which Hangman claims to have grown into.

scenes.heading: 83 EXT. SKIES - DAY - SORTIE 2 83 83
scenes.summary: The two jets are forced to spread apart as an F-18 rockets past them at sixteen miles a minute on a knife edge, canopy-to-canopy.

scenes.heading: 84 INT. MAVERICK'S F-18 - SORTIE 2 84 84
scenes.summary: Maverick greets the aviators over radio and tells them to get to work.

scenes.heading: 85 INT. MAVERICK'S F-18/INT. HANGMAN'S F-18 - SORTIE 2 85 85
scenes.summary: The pilots listen as they start putting on their masks.

scenes.heading: 86 INT. HANGMAN’S F-18 / PHOENIX/BOB'S F-18 - SORTIE 2 86 86
scenes.summary: Maverick declares 'Fight's on' as the pilots put on masks, Hangman tells Phoenix to break right while he goes vertical, but Maverick warns that leaving your wingman is a mistake.

scenes.heading: 87 INT. READY ROOM - SORTIE 2 87 87
scenes.summary: In the ready room, Rooster whispers a warning to watch her back and curses under his breath as he listens to the exercise.

scenes.heading: 88 EXT. SKIES ABOVE DESERT - SORTIE 2 88 88
scenes.summary: Maverick falls in behind Phoenix and Bob as Hangman tells Phoenix to keep Maverick busy while he's on his way.

scenes.heading: 89 INT. PHOENIX/BOB’S F-18 - SORTIE 2 89 89
scenes.summary: Phoenix executes a fierce split-S maneuver and rolls right with Bob handling it professionally, as Maverick compliments her move and style.

scenes.heading: 90 EXT. SKIES - DAY - SORTIE 2 90 90
scenes.summary: Maverick maneuvers back onto Phoenix and Bob's six o'clock position as Bob calls out that Maverick is still on them and calls for Hangman.

scenes.heading: 91 INT. PHOENIX/BOB’S F-18 - SORTIE 2 91 91
scenes.summary: Phoenix asks where Hangman is as he appears behind them, but he says he can't shoot Maverick without shooting Phoenix, then tells her to break right while Bob calls for her to break left instead.

scenes.heading: 95 INT. MAVERICK’S F-18 - SORTIE 2 95 95
scenes.summary: Phoenix's wrong move puts her directly in Maverick's gunsights and he announces the kill, telling them to knock it off.

scenes.heading: 96 INT. PHOENIX/BOB’S F-18 - SORTIE 2 96 96
scenes.summary: Phoenix punches her canopy in frustration and thanks Hangman sarcastically, while Bob apologizes and Phoenix tells him he made the right call and that Hangman sold them out.

scenes.heading: 97 INT. HANGMAN’S F-18/MAVERICK'S F-18 - SORTIE 2 97 97
scenes.summary: Hangman asks permission to continue the exercise alone against Maverick, who grants it and asks if he's ready, with Hangman offering to give Maverick a head start before 'Fight's on.'

scenes.heading: 100 EXT. SKIES/INT. HANGMAN’S F-18/MAVERICK’S F-18 - SORTIE 2 100 100
scenes.summary: Maverick does everything he can to shake Hangman but nothing works, and while initially exciting, Maverick soon feels the heat as the physical punishment mounts, while Hangman remains confident until Maverick goes supersonic.

scenes.heading: 101 EXT. TARMAC - DAY 101 101
scenes.summary: Phoenix, Bob and Hangman do their two hundred pushups on the tarmac as Hondo listens to Maverick over radio announcing another kill and calling for the next sortie.

scenes.heading: 102 EXT. SKIES - SERIES OF SHOTS - SORTIE 3 - DOGFIGHTING MONTAGE 102 102
scenes.summary: In a montage of dogfighting, Maverick systematically shoots down multiple pilots including Fritz, Coyote, Harvard, and Halo in successive engagements.

scenes.heading: 103 EXT. READY ROOM 103 103
scenes.summary: Multiple pilots collapse exhausted from pushups as Maverick announces over radio that they've shown talent but proven the best often have the most to learn, and that two have his eye for team leader.

scenes.heading: 104 INT. READY ROOM 104 104
scenes.summary: The demoralized class staggers into the ready room as Hangman and Rooster are specifically requested, with both men surprised and unhappy about being paired together.
scenes.turningPointNote: Maverick selects Hangman and Rooster as the two potential team leaders for a final test

scenes.heading: 105 EXT. SKIES ABOVE DESERT - LATER - SORTIE 4 - DAY 105 105
scenes.summary: Rooster and Hangman head out for the final sortie against Maverick.

scenes.heading: INT./EXT. F18S - INTERCUT - SORTIE 4 A106
scenes.summary: Flying in formation, Rooster and Hangman are tense as they search for Maverick, with Rooster criticizing Hangman's treatment of Phoenix while they debate where Maverick will attack from, until Maverick announces he's right there.

scenes.heading: EXT. SKIES - DAY - SORTIE 4 B106
scenes.summary: Maverick reveals he's inside their formation underneath them, then rolls and splits them from below, telling them they need to focus before engaging Rooster in an inverted spiral toward Earth.

scenes.heading: 106 INT. MAVERICK'S F-18/ROOSTER’S F-18 - SORTIE 4 106 106
scenes.summary: Maverick and Rooster engage in an intense spiral dive with crushing Gs, each trying to out-endure the other as they fall toward Earth with neither able to get a shot.

scenes.heading: INT. HANGMAN'S F-18 - SORTIE 4 A107
scenes.summary: Hangman chases the two spiraling aircraft but cannot make a shot, warning them they're running out of room as they approach the five thousand foot hard deck.

scenes.heading: 107 INT. READY ROOM - SORTIE 4 107 107
scenes.summary: The class stands in shock listening to the radio as the confrontation unfolds.

scenes.heading: INT. ROOSTER AND MAV’S F18S INTERCUT - SORTIE 4 A108
scenes.summary: As they plummet with the altimeter calling out their descent, Rooster tells Maverick he'll wash him out anyway, leading to Rooster declaring 'You are the enemy' when Maverick brings up the past, while Maverick warns the enemy is about to run him into the ground.
scenes.turningPointNote: The buried conflict between Maverick and Rooster explodes into the open during their dangerous spiral dive

scenes.heading: INT. READY ROOM - SORTIE 4 B108
scenes.summary: Phoenix watches in shock at how personal the fight between Maverick and Rooster has become.

scenes.heading: 108 INT. HANGMAN’S F-18 - SORTIE 4 108 108
scenes.summary: Hangman watches the two planes plummet in a DNA-helix spiral and calls them crazy as they blow through the hard deck altitude limit.

scenes.heading: 109 EXT. SKIES - DAY - SORTIE 4 109 109
scenes.summary: An aircraft continues spiraling downward with the ground approaching rapidly.

scenes.heading: 110 INT. READY ROOM - SORTIE 4 110 110
scenes.summary: Everyone in the ready room hears the altimeter readings dropping.

scenes.heading: 111 INT. ROOSTER'S F-18 - SORTIE 4 111 111
scenes.summary: Maverick tells Rooster to bail out anytime while both watch their altimeters drop rapidly, with Rooster responding he can go as low as Maverick before both pull out dangerously close to the ground.

scenes.heading: 112 EXT. SKIES - SORTIE 4 112 112
scenes.summary: Maverick banks hard with Rooster falling in behind him and Hangman backing them up, as Maverick encourages Rooster to drop lower for a shot.

scenes.heading: INT. HANGMAN'S F-18 - SORTIE 4 A113
scenes.summary: Hangman urges Rooster to drop down and take the shot on Maverick.

scenes.heading: 113 INT. ROOSTER’S F-18 - DAY - SORTIE 4 113 113
scenes.summary: Rooster banks hard dangerously close to the ground and shouts that they're too low.

scenes.heading: 114 INT. MAVERICK'S F-18/EXT. SKIES - SORTIE 4 114 114
scenes.summary: Maverick apologizes to Rooster and executes a cobra maneuver that forces Rooster and Hangman to split and overshoot, putting Maverick in chase position.

scenes.heading: 115 INT. ROOSTER'S F-18 - SORTIE 4 115 115
scenes.summary: Rooster hears the targeting tone as Maverick announces a kill.

scenes.heading: 116 INT. ROOSTER’S F-18 - SORTIE 4 116 116
scenes.summary: Rooster seethes but concedes the fight by copying the kill.

scenes.heading: 117 INT. READY ROOM - SORTIE 4 117 117
scenes.summary: Everyone in the ready room exhales and shares looks, recognizing this is next level training.

scenes.heading: 118 EXT. TARMAC - ELSEWHERE - DUSK 118 118
scenes.summary: Rooster does push-ups on the tarmac in frustration until Hondo tells him that's enough, then Phoenix approaches asking what's wrong with him and why he's trying to get kicked out.

scenes.heading: 119 INT. READY ROOM 119 119
scenes.summary: Hangman points out Goose in a Class of '86 photo to Coyote, noting that Goose looks familiar and reading the names Pete Mitchell and his RIO Goose Bradshaw.
scenes.turningPointNote: Hangman discovers the connection between Maverick and Rooster through the photo of Goose

scenes.heading: 120 INT. CYCLONE’S OFFICE - MOMENTS LATER - MORNING 120 120
scenes.summary: Cyclone reprimands Maverick for breaking the hard deck rule and performing a dangerous cobra maneuver, while Maverick argues the pilots still have something to learn despite being told they're the best.

scenes.heading: 121 INT. CORRIDOR OUTSIDE CYCLONE’S OFFICE - DAY 121 121
scenes.summary: Maverick and Warlock exit Cyclone's office walking in silence, with Warlock commenting on Maverick's timing as they pass Phoenix and Bob.

scenes.heading: 124 EXT. HARD DECK - DAY 124 124
scenes.summary: Maverick rides his motorcycle past the Hard Deck, makes a U-turn, and drives back to the bar.

scenes.heading: 125 INT. HARD DECK - BAR AREA - DAY 125 125
scenes.summary: Maverick enters the Hard Deck and encounters Amelia doing homework, then Penny appears and he insists on paying off a debt despite her protests.

scenes.heading: 126 EXT. PACIFIC OCEAN - DAY 126 126
scenes.summary: Maverick and Penny sail through rough waters with Maverick struggling to help with the boat while Penny teaches him sailing techniques using airplane analogies.

scenes.heading: EXT. STREETS - DUSK AB127
scenes.summary: Maverick drives Penny on his motorcycle through the streets as she holds onto him and lays her head on his shoulder.

scenes.heading: EXT. PENNY’S HOUSE - DUSK AC127
scenes.summary: Maverick and Penny have an awkward goodnight at her house, with Penny telling him not to give her 'that look' before going inside.

scenes.heading: INT. PENNY'S HOUSE AD127
scenes.summary: Penny enters her house and leans against the door, dropping her cool demeanor and listening to Maverick's bike ride away before Amelia calls to her.

scenes.heading: INT. TACTICAL AUDITORIUM - DAY A127
scenes.summary: Maverick briefs the pilots on the mission's low-level ingress through a narrow canyon defended by surface-to-air missiles, explaining they'll attack below the radar coverage.
scenes.turningPointNote: The actual mission parameters are revealed, establishing the impossible nature of the task

scenes.heading: 127 EXT. MOUNTAINS - “ LOW-LEVEL INGRESS TRAINING ” - SORTIE 1 127 127
scenes.summary: F-18s rip through canyons and valleys at incredible speed in a brutal slalom during low-level ingress training.

scenes.heading: 128 INT. PHOENIX/BOB’S/COYOTE’S F-18S - DAY 128 128
scenes.summary: Phoenix and Bob fly behind Coyote through rocky desert terrain, with Phoenix navigating using GPS while Bob monitors their timing, both sweating under tremendous G-forces.

scenes.heading: 129 EXT. TRAINING CANYON - DAY 129 129
scenes.summary: Coyote cannot make a required turn during the training run.

scenes.heading: 130 INT. COYOTE’S F-18 - DAY 130 130
scenes.summary: Coyote hits the brakes and strays over the red line on his GPS, triggering an alarm as he curses in frustration.

scenes.heading: INT. PHOENIX/BOB’S F-18 - DAY A131
scenes.summary: Phoenix sees Coyote's jet with airbrakes extended and yanks her stick into a near vertical climb, breaking the 200 foot ceiling.

scenes.heading: 131 INT. TACTICAL AUDITORIUM - DAY - DEBRIEF 131 131
scenes.summary: Maverick debriefs the failed training run, with Phoenix explaining they broke the ceiling and were killed by SAMs, while Coyote takes responsibility for not warning his team.

scenes.heading: 132 EXT. TRAINING CANYONS/INT. F-18S - SORTIE 2 - DAY 132 132
scenes.summary: Payback and Hangman fly the training course with Hangman refusing to slow down despite Payback's warnings, causing Payback to break the ceiling when forced too close to the canyon wall.

scenes.heading: 133 INT. TACTICAL AUDITORIUM - DAY - DEBRIEF 133 133
scenes.summary: Maverick debriefs Hangman's failed run, with Hangman defending his speed while Rooster points out he endangered his wingman, leading to tension between them.

scenes.heading: 134 EXT. TRAINING CANYONS - SORTIE 3 - DAY 134 134
scenes.summary: Rooster leads Harvard and Yale through the training course with extreme skill, but they fall behind schedule despite his refusal to increase speed.

scenes.heading: 135 INT. ROOSTER’S F-18/HARVARD-YALE F-18 135 135
scenes.summary: Rooster maintains current speed despite Harvard and Yale's urgings to go faster, insisting they can make up time and complete the mission.

scenes.heading: 141 INT. TACTICAL AUDITORIUM - DEBRIEF - DAY 141 141
scenes.summary: Maverick confronts Rooster about being a minute late to target, with other pilots pointing out the mission's impossible parameters while Rooster insists he made it to the target and survived.
scenes.turningPointNote: The fundamental conflict between Maverick and Rooster's approaches to the mission comes to a head

scenes.heading: 143 INT. TACTICAL AUDITORIUM - NIGHT 143 143
scenes.summary: Maverick sits alone in the tactical auditorium at day's end and receives a text from Iceman wanting to see him.

scenes.heading: 144 EXT. ADMIRAL’S HOUSE - CORONADO COAST - DUSK 144 144
scenes.summary: Maverick arrives at Admiral Kazansky's house where Sarah greets him and reveals that Iceman's cancer has returned, though no one else knows.
scenes.turningPointNote: Iceman's terminal condition is revealed, threatening Maverick's protection

scenes.heading: 145 INT. ADMIRAL’S OFFICE - MOMENTS LATER 145 145
scenes.summary: Maverick enters Iceman's office and sees his old wingman at his desk with a bandage around his throat, unable to speak and communicating through typing.

scenes.heading: 146 INT. TACTICAL AUDITORIUM - DAY 146 146
scenes.summary: Cyclone walks into the empty tactical auditorium, curious about where everyone is.

scenes.heading: 147 INT. READY ROOM - DAY 147 147
scenes.summary: Cyclone checks the ready room and finds it also empty.

scenes.heading: 148 INT. TOP GUN HANGAR - DAY 148 148
scenes.summary: Cyclone studies the deserted hangar with F-18s sitting idle.

scenes.heading: 149 EXT. CORONADO BEACH - DAY 149 149
scenes.summary: The pilots play dogfight football with two balls and two teams, with Maverick and Rooster as opposing quarterbacks in chaotic gameplay focused on sacking Maverick.

scenes.heading: 150 EXT. HARD DECK BAR - REAR 150 150
scenes.summary: Cyclone confronts Maverick about the football game while Maverick explains it's team building, leading to Cyclone questioning the use of training time.

scenes.heading: EXT. HARD DECK B152
scenes.summary: Penny observes that Maverick is good with the pilots and might be enjoying the teaching job, while Maverick deflects and mentions something about time.

scenes.heading: 153 EXT. PENNY’S HOUSE - NIGHT 153 153
scenes.summary: Maverick and Penny arrive at her house on his motorcycle, and after a pause, Penny asks if he's coming inside.

scenes.heading: 154 INT. PENNY'S HOUSE - BEDROOM - NIGHT 154 154
scenes.summary: Maverick and Penny lie in bed talking, with Maverick revealing he pulled Rooster's academy papers and set back his career to protect him from dying like his father.
scenes.turningPointNote: Maverick's betrayal of Rooster is fully revealed, explaining their conflict

scenes.heading: 155 EXT. PENNY'S HOUSE - NIGHT 155 155
scenes.summary: Maverick climbs out of Penny's window and encounters Amelia in the kitchen, who warns him not to break her mother's heart again.

scenes.heading: 156 INT. TACTICAL AUDITORIUM - DAY 156 156
scenes.summary: Warlock announces to the class that the mission has been moved up one week because the uranium plant will be operational sooner than expected, with no pilot having successfully completed the training course.
scenes.turningPointNote: The mission timeline is accelerated, creating impossible pressure with inadequate preparation

scenes.heading: 157 EXT. CALIFORNIA DESERT - “ POP-UP TARGETING TRAINING ” 157 157
scenes.summary: Two F-18s blast low over desert ground during pop-up targeting training.

scenes.heading: 158 INT. ROOSTER’S/PHOENIX & BOB’S F18S - SORTIE 1 - DAY 158 158
scenes.summary: Rooster and Phoenix with Bob fly as a team in welded wing formation toward rusted shipping containers during the first sortie.

scenes.heading: 159 INT. HANGMAN/PAYBACK & FANBOY’S F18S - SORTIE 2 - DAY 159 159
scenes.summary: Hangman and Payback with Fanboy fly in formation toward the same target in a separate sortie, with Maverick explaining the importance of precise coordination.

scenes.heading: 160 INT. TACTICAL AUDITORIUM - BRIEF 160 160
scenes.summary: Maverick briefs the class on the final phase, explaining they must invert into a steep dive between mountains to hit a target less than three meters wide.

scenes.heading: 161 EXT. CALIFORNIA DESERT/INT. F18S - SORTIE 1&2 - INTERCUT 161 161
scenes.summary: Both teams practice the complex maneuver of climbing, rolling onto their backs, diving upside down, then rolling upright for the steep dive without actual mountains.

scenes.heading: 162 INT. TACTICAL AUDITORIUM - BRIEF 162 162
scenes.summary: Maverick briefs the class on the mission plan, explaining that two teams will deliver laser-guided bombs through a ventilation shaft, calling it 'miracle number one' and 'miracle number two.'

scenes.heading: 163 EXT. CALIFORNIA DESERT/INT. F18S - SORTIE 1&2 - INTERCUT 163 163
scenes.summary: During training sorties, both Hangman/Payback and Rooster/Phoenix miss their targets, with pilots cursing their failures and Rooster apologizing to Bob.

scenes.heading: 164 INT. TACTICAL AUDITORIUM - BRIEF 164 164
scenes.summary: Maverick explains the dangerous high-G egress climb while both pilot teams strain under crushing G-forces during their steep climbs out of the valley.

scenes.heading: 165 INT. TACTICAL AUDITORIUM - BRIEF 165 165
scenes.summary: Maverick shows an animation of aircraft crashing into a mountain and warns the class about 'coffin corner' and enemy SAMs that will fire upon them during their climb.

scenes.heading: 167 EXT. CALIFORNIA DESERT/INT. F18S - SORTIE 1&2 - INTERCUT 167 167
scenes.summary: Both pilot teams strain desperately during their pullout maneuvers while Maverick describes the crushing physical effects of extreme G-forces on their bodies.

scenes.heading: INT. TACTICAL AUDITORIUM - BRIEF A170
scenes.summary: Maverick explains their only survival chance is getting below radar and following the canyon back to the carrier, then reveals the threat of enemy fifth-generation fighters.

scenes.heading: 170 EXT. CALIFORNIA DESERT - POP UP SORTIE 3 170 170
scenes.summary: Two F-18s streak toward the target in the distance while Maverick's black F-18 rises into frame on an intercept course.

scenes.heading: INT. COYOTE - PHOENIX/BOB F18S INTERCUT - POP UP SORTIE 3 A171
scenes.summary: Coyote leads the team but they're twelve seconds late on target when Bob spots Maverick approaching as a bandit at 700 knots closure, causing tension in the cockpit.

scenes.heading: 171 EXT. CALIFORNIA DESERT/INT. F18S - POP UP SORTIE 3 171 171
scenes.summary: During their pop-up maneuver, Coyote experiences a hung bomb malfunction and cannot release his payload despite multiple attempts, forcing him to pull out of the dive.

scenes.heading: INT. TACTICAL AUDITORUM - POP UP SORTIE 3 A196
scenes.summary: Coyote's plane crosses the imaginary failure line during the training exercise.

scenes.heading: INT. MAVERICK’S F-18 - DAY - POP UP SORTIE 3 B196
scenes.summary: Maverick radios that Coyote has failed and orders him to return to base.

scenes.heading: INT. COYOTE’S F-18 - DAY - POP UP SORTIE 3 C196
scenes.summary: Coyote continues pulling hard despite the failure call, and his vision begins to gray out with tunnel vision as he starts blacking out from G-forces.

scenes.heading: 196 INT. MAVERICK’S F-18 - DAY - POP UP SORTIE 3 196 196
scenes.summary: Maverick sees Coyote's near-vertical jet starting to nose over and radios for him to level his wings.

scenes.heading: 197 INT. TACTICAL AUDITORIUM - DAY - POP UP SORTIE 3 197 197
scenes.summary: The others watch Coyote's plane start to roll while Cyclone steps closer, recognizing something is wrong.

scenes.heading: 198 EXT. SKIES OVER RANGE - DAY - POP UP SORTIE 3 198 198
scenes.summary: Coyote's F-18 is inverted and headed back toward the ground.

scenes.heading: 200 INT. PHOENIX-BOB’S F-18 - DAY - POP UP SORTIE 3 200 200
scenes.summary: Phoenix identifies that Coyote is in G-LOC and going down.

scenes.heading: 202 EXT. SKIES OVER RANGE - POP UP SORTIE 3 202 202
scenes.summary: Maverick dives after Coyote's falling plane while Phoenix and Bob follow in tight formation, with Maverick trying to get a targeting tone.

scenes.heading: 203 INT. COYOTE'S F-18 - POP UP SORTIE 3 203 203
scenes.summary: Coyote regains consciousness from warning alarms, sees the ground approaching fast, yanks back on the stick and regains control of his aircraft.

scenes.heading: INT. MAVERICK’S F-18 - DAY - POP UP SORTIE 3 A204
scenes.summary: Maverick pulls off his oxygen mask in relief while Phoenix expresses relief over the radio, and Maverick orders everyone to return to base.

scenes.heading: INT. TACTICAL AUDITORIUM - DAY - POP UP SORTIE 3 B204
scenes.summary: Cyclone, Warlock, Hondo and the class watch the events unfold on screens in the tactical auditorium.

scenes.heading: INT. MAVERICK’S F-18 - POP UP SORTIE 3 C204
scenes.summary: Maverick hears a bang and looks around his cockpit in confusion.

scenes.heading: INT. PHOENIX/BOB'S F-18 - POP UP SORTIE 3 D204
scenes.summary: Phoenix and Bob's F-18 suffers engine failure and catches fire, with Bob reporting both engines are out as Phoenix attempts emergency procedures.

scenes.heading: INT. MAVERICK’S F-18 - DAY - POP UP SORTIE 3 E204
scenes.summary: Maverick sees Phoenix's jet veering and hears Bob report the right engine is out, prompting Maverick to exclaim in alarm.

scenes.heading: INT. TACTICAL AUDITORIUM - DAY - POP UP SORTIE 3 F204
scenes.summary: Everyone in the auditorium watches helplessly while Rooster stands powerless, only able to watch the crisis unfold.

scenes.heading: INT. PHOENIX/BOB'S F-18 - DAY - POP UP SORTIE 3 G204
scenes.summary: Phoenix struggles to control the plane as Bob reports all warning lights are lit, Phoenix loses hydraulics and control, and Maverick orders them to eject.

scenes.heading: INT. TACTICAL AUDITORUM - POP UP SORTIE 3 H204
scenes.summary: Rooster shouts for Phoenix to eject from the tactical auditorium.

scenes.heading: 204 EXT. SKIES OVER RANGE - POP UP SORTIE 3 204 204
scenes.summary: Phoenix grabs the ejection handles, the canopy blows, and she and Bob eject seconds before their jet collides with the desert floor and explodes.
scenes.turningPointNote: Major training accident occurs, escalating the stakes and consequences of the dangerous mission preparation

scenes.heading: 205 INT. MAVERICK’S F-18 - POP UP SORTIE 3 205 205
scenes.summary: Maverick watches the two parachutes drift and sees flashes of the past before radioing the tower to send a helicopter for the downed plane.

scenes.heading: 206 EXT. COASTAL MOUNTAINS - DAY 206 206
scenes.summary: A Coast Guard helicopter conducts a rescue operation, with crewmen rappelling and successfully retrieving Phoenix and Bob from the slope.

scenes.heading: 207 INT. INFIRMARY - NIGHT 207 207
scenes.summary: Cyclone interrogates Phoenix and Bob in the infirmary about whether Maverick's training pushed them beyond their abilities, with both defending the training as necessary.

scenes.heading: 208 INT. CORRIDOR OUTSIDE INFIRMARY 208 208
scenes.summary: Maverick waits anxiously outside the infirmary when Warlock and Hondo arrive to report that a bird strike caused Phoenix's engine failure, clearing Maverick of blame.

scenes.heading: 209 INT. READY ROOM - DUSK 209 209
scenes.summary: Rooster sits alone in the ready room, deletes a photo of himself with Maverick from his phone, then discusses with Maverick about never losing a wingman.

scenes.heading: 210 EXT. MILITARY CEMETERY - DAY - THREE DAYS LATER 210 210
scenes.summary: At Iceman's military funeral, Maverick delivers a eulogy about what it means to be a wingman while Iceman's family and fellow officers attend the ceremony.

scenes.heading: INT. CYCLONE'S OFFICE A212
scenes.summary: Cyclone removes Maverick from training duty despite Maverick's protests that the pilots aren't ready and there's only one way to fly the mission.
scenes.turningPointNote: Maverick is removed from command, fundamentally changing his role and the training approach

scenes.heading: 212 EXT. PENNY’S HOUSE - DUSK 212 212
scenes.summary: Penny tells Maverick he's not finished and will never forgive himself if anything happens to his pilots, urging him to find a way back on his own.

scenes.heading: 213 INT. TACTICAL AUDITORIUM - NEXT DAY 213 213
scenes.summary: Cyclone instructs the trainees with modified mission parameters, increasing time to target to four minutes and reducing speed, which concerns Rooster and Bob.

scenes.heading: 214 EXT. TRAINING CANYONS - DAY 214 214
scenes.summary: Maverick's black F-18 screams across the landscape, dropping lower as mountain peaks loom ahead.

scenes.heading: 215 INT. MAVERICK’S F-18 215 215
scenes.summary: Maverick radios Range Control requesting permission to enter at Point Alpha and confirm a green range for his unauthorized training run.

scenes.heading: 216 INT. TACTICAL AUDITORIUM - DAY 216 216
scenes.summary: The class reacts as Cyclone orders all screens brought up to watch Maverick's unauthorized flight, with Range Control questioning his unscheduled event.

scenes.heading: 217 EXT. TRAINING CANYONS - DAY 217 217
scenes.summary: Maverick's afterburner roars as he slices ahead, studying the three routes on his display and locking in his focus.

scenes.heading: 218 INT. TACTICAL AUDITORIUM - DAY 218 218
scenes.summary: Rooster watches Maverick's screen POV as Maverick sets an impossible time to target of two minutes fifteen seconds, prompting Payback to call it impossible.

scenes.heading: 219 EXT. TRAINING CANYON - DAY 219 219
scenes.summary: Maverick's jet roars into the course, dipping dangerously low and skimming right above the riverbed floor as he radios his final attack point.

scenes.heading: 220 INT. TACTICAL AUDITORIUM - DAY 220 220
scenes.summary: Rooster and the rest of the class watch Maverick's timer and altitude levels during his dangerous low-level run.

scenes.heading: 221 EXT. TRAINING CANYONS - DAY 221 221
scenes.summary: Maverick's F-18 navigates the tight canyon curves but he says 'It's no good' and suddenly climbs out of the valley, appearing to abort the run.

scenes.heading: 222 INT. TACTICAL AUDITORIUM 222 222
scenes.summary: The class watches Maverick climb out with disappointment, Coyote declaring nobody can do it, while Cyclone orders Hondo to tell the tower to land Maverick immediately.

scenes.heading: 223 INT. MAVERICK'S F-18 223 223
scenes.summary: Maverick shuts off his radio when ordered to land, talks to Goose, resets the clock and dives back for a second attempt at the impossible run.

scenes.heading: 224 INT. TACTICAL AUDITORIUM - DAY 224 224
scenes.summary: Cyclone orders the screens shut off but the class remains transfixed watching Maverick's second attempt, with Bob timing the run as Maverick flies dangerously low.

scenes.heading: 225 EXT. RANGE 225 225
scenes.summary: Maverick's F-18 explodes over the range at 920 knots and twenty feet off the deck in a dramatic display of speed and skill.

scenes.heading: 226 INT. MAVERICK’S F-18 - DAY 226 226
scenes.summary: Maverick executes his pop-up climb under severe G-forces, rolls into his bombing dive, and drops a training round while struggling to target without a wingman.

scenes.heading: 227 EXT. BOMBING RANGE - DAY 227 227
scenes.summary: Maverick drops his training round during the dive and swoops into a climb at the last possible second as smoke hits the target.
scenes.turningPointNote: Maverick successfully demonstrates the 'impossible' mission can be accomplished, proving his training methods and parameters were correct

scenes.heading: 228 INT. TACTICAL AUDITORIUM - DAY 228 228
scenes.summary: Fanboy celebrates hitting the bullseye target while Bob confirms the time on target as two minutes fifteen seconds to the second.

scenes.heading: 229 INT. MAVERICK’S F-18 - DAY 229 229
scenes.summary: Maverick battles his F-18 through a punishing 10 G egress maneuver, fighting to clear the virtual mountain.

scenes.heading: 230 INT. TACTICAL AUDITORIUM - DAY 230 230
scenes.summary: Maverick radios that the target is destroyed as trainees react to his impossible 10 G performance, while Rooster sits back troubled and Cyclone stares unreadably at the screen.
scenes.turningPointNote: Maverick proves the mission is possible but at great personal cost, setting up his confrontation with Cyclone

scenes.heading: 233 INT. CYCLONE’S OFFICE 233 233
scenes.summary: Cyclone tells Maverick he's demonstrated the mission can be flown but did so by stealing a military aircraft, threatening court-martial and dishonorable discharge now that Iceman can no longer protect him.
scenes.turningPointNote: Maverick faces the ultimate consequence for proving his point - his career and freedom are on the line

scenes.heading: 236 INT. HARD DECK - NIGHT 236 236
scenes.summary: Maverick enters the crowded Hard Deck in uniform, and Penny's smile fades when she sees the look on his face.

scenes.heading: 237 EXT. HARD DECK - NIGHT 237 237
scenes.summary: Penny, now up to speed and stunned by Maverick's situation, embraces him tightly as he stares with eyes set on an uncertain future.

scenes.heading: 238 EXT. USS THEODORE ROOSEVELT - CARRIER READY ROOM - NIGHT 238 238
scenes.summary: The imposing USS Theodore Roosevelt cuts through ocean waves as Warlock begins describing the target as a clear and present threat.

scenes.heading: 239 INT. USS THEODORE ROOSEVELT - CARRIER READY ROOM NIGHT 239 239
scenes.summary: Warlock briefs the pilots on the uranium enrichment site mission, explaining the heavily defended route, synchronized Tomahawk strike, and critical two-minute thirty-second time window before enemy aircraft respond.
scenes.turningPointNote: The real mission parameters are revealed, establishing the life-or-death stakes

scenes.heading: EXT. CARRIER ELEVATOR - DAWN A240
scenes.summary: Maverick rises on the carrier elevator holding his helmet, deeply troubled, asking Goose to talk to him before Warlock tells him he belongs here and to make them proud.

scenes.heading: 240 EXT. FLIGHT DECK - USS THEODORE ROOSEVELT - DAWN 240 240
scenes.summary: The pilots step onto the flight deck for the real mission, Hangman tells Rooster to give them hell, and Rooster calls Maverick by name for the first time before they shake hands and Maverick tells him he's got this.
scenes.turningPointNote: Rooster finally acknowledges Maverick by name, signaling their relationship has shifted before the mission

scenes.heading: 244 INT. ROOSTER’S F-18 - DAWN 244 244
scenes.summary: Maverick conducts a radio communications check from his F-18.

scenes.heading: 245 INT. F-18 - PHOENIX/BOB/ROOSTER - DAWN 245 245
scenes.summary: Phoenix and Bob sweat and psych themselves past anxiety as Phoenix reports ready.

scenes.heading: INT. F-18 - ROOSTER - DAWN A246
scenes.summary: Rooster shakes off his nerves and reports ready.

scenes.heading: 246 INT. F-18 - PAYBACK/FANBOY - DAWN 246 246
scenes.summary: Fanboy crosses himself while Payback exhales and reports ready.

scenes.heading: INT. HANGMAN’S F-18 - DAWN A247
scenes.summary: Hangman reports as the spare aircraft, ready and standing by.

scenes.heading: 247 INT. MAVERICK’S F-18 - DAWN 247 247
scenes.summary: Maverick hesitates before responding to the radio check.

scenes.heading: INT. F-18'S INTERCUT A248
scenes.summary: The other pilots wait in awkward silence until Rooster asks if Maverick copies.

scenes.heading: INT. MAVERICK’S F18 - DAWN B248
scenes.summary: Maverick thanks the pilots for trusting him to lead them.

scenes.heading: INT. F-18'S INTERCUT C248
scenes.summary: Maverick tells the pilots they're the best of the best and it's an honor flying with all of them, as Phoenix responds they're with him all the way.

scenes.heading: INT. MAVERICK'S F18 DAWN D248
scenes.summary: Maverick tells them to forget the sir, they're all the same rank today, and clips on his mask.

scenes.heading: 248 INT. COMMAND CENTER - USS THEODORE ROOSEVELT - DAWN 248 248
scenes.summary: Cyclone orders the launch as the command center reports the strike package is ready.
scenes.turningPointNote: The point of no return - Cyclone gives the order to launch the mission

scenes.heading: 249 EXT. FLIGHT DECK - DAWN 249 249
scenes.summary: Maverick and Rooster salute side-by-side before their Super Hornets are catapulted into the sky, followed by Phoenix, Bob, Payback and Fanboy.

scenes.heading: 250 EXT. SKIES ABOVE CLOUDS - MORNING 250 250
scenes.summary: Four F-18s fly above dark clouds as Maverick coordinates with air control and support aircraft report their status.

scenes.heading: 253 INT. F-18S - WITH ROOSTER/MAVERICK - MORNING 253 253
scenes.summary: Rooster takes a deep breath as they descend through clouds to 1000 feet, then Maverick takes them down to 100 feet and proceeds to the target.

scenes.heading: INT. F-18’S INTERCUT - MORNING A254
scenes.summary: All pilots start their countdown timers in sync and form up in delta formation toward enemy territory.

scenes.heading: INT. COMMAND CENTER - USS THEODORE ROOSEVELT - DAWN AM254
scenes.summary: A tech starts a timer on the command center panel while Hondo clicks his own stopwatch.

scenes.heading: EXT. OCEAN AA254
scenes.summary: The jets switch from diamond formation to snake position as they roar across the ocean.

scenes.heading: INT. F18S INTERCUT BB254
scenes.summary: All pilots sweat on the ragged edge, with Rooster breathing heavily and sweating bullets as he struggles to hold it together.

scenes.heading: 254 EXT. SKIES ABOVE MOUNTAINS - MORNING 254 254
scenes.summary: The jets approach snowy mountains with tighter canyons than training as Rooster watches the narrow canyon coming up fast and glances at his airspeed.

scenes.heading: INT. F18S - INTERCUT AA255
scenes.summary: Rooster tells himself to stay cool as Maverick calls out the target valley ahead and requests a picture from air control.

scenes.heading: INT. F-18S INTERCUT A255
scenes.summary: Air control reports picture clean and recommends continue as Maverick calls dagger attack and all pilots take a deep breath to commit.

scenes.heading: EXT. SKIES AB255
scenes.summary: The four jets roar into the narrow canyon as tension gives way to terror, flying beneath bridges while Bob spots SAM missile arrays overhead that remain inactive.

scenes.heading: EXT. USS LEYTE GULF - MORNING B255
scenes.summary: Tomahawk missiles launch from the USS Leyte Gulf in massive plumes of smoke and fire.

scenes.heading: 255 INT. COMMAND CENTER - USS THEODORE ROOSEVELT - MORNING 255 255
scenes.summary: The command center reports birds away as Warlock declares there's no turning back now.

scenes.heading: 256 EXT. SKIES/INT. F-18’S - MORNING - GOLD ROUTE 256 256
scenes.summary: The jets shoot through an ever-compressing canyon at high speed with sharp turns creating intense G-forces, with Rooster struggling most as his wing clips treetops.

scenes.heading: INT. F-18S INTERCUT A257
scenes.summary: The pilots report their status as they fall behind schedule, with Rooster struggling in his cockpit, breathing shallow and unable to go fast enough despite Payback's urgings.

scenes.heading: INT. COMMAND CENTER - USS THEODORE ROOSEVELT - MORNING B257
scenes.summary: The command center reports Dagger 3 is falling behind and disengaging as satellite imagery shows enemy ground crews on alert and fifth generation fighters preparing for takeoff.

scenes.heading: INT. ROOSTER'S F-18 C257
scenes.summary: Rooster struggles to hold it together as Payback tells him they're way behind and he needs to go, but Rooster's hand remains frozen on the throttle unable to push harder.

scenes.heading: EXT. ENEMY AIRFIELD - MORNING A275
scenes.summary: Air crews scramble to prep F-14 Tomcats at the enemy airfield before the first Tomahawk missile impacts and decimates a hangar.

scenes.heading: 275 INT. COMMAND CENTER - USS THEODORE ROOSEVELT - MORNING 275 275
scenes.summary: The command center watches the enemy airfield vanish in heat blooms as Cyclone tells them to hit their target and come home.

scenes.heading: EXT. SKIES/INT. F-18S INTERCUT - MORNING AA278
scenes.summary: Rooster and Payback lag further behind as Fanboy's targeting pod malfunctions, creating a critical thirty-second window to fix it while Maverick counts on him.

scenes.heading: EXT. SKIES - MORNING A278
scenes.summary: Fifth generation enemy fighter aircraft streak across the sky on the hunt.

scenes.heading: INT. COMMAND CENTER - USS THOEDORE ROOSEVELT - MORNING B278
scenes.summary: The command center detects two bandits inbound as Cyclone asks where they came from and Hondo urges Rooster to move it or lose it.

scenes.heading: INT. MAVERICK’S F18 AA278
scenes.summary: Air control warns Maverick of two bandits thirty miles north with one minute to intercept as he asks Rooster where he is.

scenes.heading: INT. ROOSTER'S F-18 AB278
scenes.summary: Rooster sweats and strains through turns with his hand frozen on the throttle as Maverick calls for him to respond.

scenes.heading: EXT. PAYBACK/FANBOY F-18 AC278
scenes.summary: Fanboy's targeting pod stabilizes and comes back online.

scenes.heading: INT. F-18S INTERCUT - MORNING B278
scenes.summary: Rooster finally pushes his throttle after talking to his dad, crossing over to another level of performance as all sound falls away and he pulls ahead of Payback.
scenes.turningPointNote: Rooster overcomes his fear and limitation by connecting with his father's memory, finding his true capability

scenes.heading: INT. COMMAND CENTER - USS THEODORE ROOSEVELT C278
scenes.summary: The command center reports that Dagger 3 is re-engaging with the attack team.

scenes.heading: INT. ROOSTER'S F-18 D278
scenes.summary: Rooster catches up and reports visual contact with Maverick and Phoenix, confirming he's on their six.

scenes.heading: INT. MAVERICK'S F-18 - ORANGE/PURPLE POP BOWL LOCATION E278
scenes.summary: Maverick tells Rooster he's just in time to deliver the mail and go home as he and Phoenix roll inverted and crest a mountain, dropping into the target valley.
scenes.turningPointNote: The final attack run begins as the team reunites and commits to the target

scenes.heading: 278 INT. F-18 - PHOENIX/BOB - MORNING - PURPLE ROUTE 278 278
scenes.summary: Bob successfully captures the target with his FLIR system while Phoenix holds their arc steady and Maverick encourages him over radio.

scenes.heading: INT. MAVERICK'S F-18 A279
scenes.summary: Maverick confirms target acquisition and releases his bombs.

scenes.heading: EXT. UNDER MAVERICK’S F-18 B279
scenes.summary: Two super bunker buster bombs drop from Maverick's F-18 and acquire laser guidance.

scenes.heading: EXT. SKIES/INT. MAV/PHOENIX F-18'S C279
scenes.summary: Maverick and Phoenix execute a body-smashing climb at over 7.5 Gs to escape the mountain face while Bob struggles against the G-forces to maintain laser targeting.

scenes.heading: EXT. VALLEY BASIN - MORNING D279
scenes.summary: Maverick's bunker buster bomb hits the target.

scenes.heading: INT. PHOENIX’S F-18 - BLUE ROUTE E279
scenes.summary: Phoenix pulls back hard as Bob confirms impact and the target is obscured by massive smoke.

scenes.heading: INT. COMMAND CENTER - USS THEODORE ROOSEVELT F279
scenes.summary: The command center confirms a direct hit but tension increases as Warlock calls it miracle number one and Cyclone notes they're now in coffin corner.

scenes.heading: EXT. MOUNTAINSIDE AG279
scenes.summary: A radar-controlled SAM array automatically activates and fires at the two F-18s climbing in the distance.

scenes.heading: INT/EXT. MAV/PHOENIX/BOB F-18S INTERCUT - POP BOWL LOCATION G279
scenes.summary: Maverick warns of smoke in the air as he and Phoenix bank hard and fire countermeasures while SAMs streak toward them.

scenes.heading: INT. ROOSTER’S F-18 - MORNING - ORANGE ROUTE H279
scenes.summary: Rooster radios Payback that he's popping in three, two, one.

scenes.heading: EXT. SKIES ABOVE VALLEY - MORNING - ORANGE/PURPLE ROUTE I279
scenes.summary: Rooster and Payback crest the mountaintop just as Maverick and Phoenix did.

scenes.heading: INT/EXT. MAV/PHOENIX/BOB F-18S INTERCUT J279
scenes.summary: Maverick and Phoenix fly for their lives, dodging missiles as they race for the valley below.

scenes.heading: 279 INT. ROOSTER’S F-18 - MORNING - PURPLE ROUTE 279 279
scenes.summary: Rooster executes a scorching 45-degree dive but their laser targeting system fails, forcing him to continue the attack without guidance as the target approaches fast.

scenes.heading: 284 EXT. FACILITY SITE - MORNING - PURPLE ROUTE 284 284
scenes.summary: The bunker buster bombs vanish into the cloud left by Maverick's bombs, followed by agonizing stillness.

scenes.heading: INT/EXT. MAV/PHOENIX/BOB F-18S INTERCUT AA286
scenes.summary: Maverick and Phoenix fight for their lives with alarms blaring and SAMs everywhere.

scenes.heading: 286 EXT. TARGET VALLEY/INT. ROOSTER’S JET - BLUE ROUTE 286 286
scenes.summary: Rooster battles his jet in a climbing escape with Payback beside him, brushing snow off treetops as he grays out and a SAM alarm sounds.

scenes.heading: 287 EXT. FACILITY SITE - MORNING 287 287
scenes.summary: A rippling subterranean explosion heaves the earth and the underground facility implodes on itself.
scenes.turningPointNote: The primary mission objective is achieved - the facility is destroyed

scenes.heading: INT. HANGMAN'S F-18 - MORNING A289
scenes.summary: Hangman sits in his waiting F-18 listening to the radio as the command center confirms bullseye over comms.

scenes.heading: 288 INT. COMMAND CENTER - USS THEODORE ROOSEVELT - MORNING 288 288
scenes.summary: The command center confirms target destroyed via satellite imagery while Cyclone listens to pilots struggling over radio and Hondo's stopwatch crystal cracks ominously.

scenes.heading: INT. ROOSTER/PAYBACK FANBOY F18S AA290
scenes.summary: Rooster and Payback dodge missiles and fire countermeasures until Rooster runs out of flares and sees a missile coming, then another F-18 fills his sight picture as he shouts 'Maverick, no.'

scenes.heading: INT. MAVERICK’S F-18 (OLD SC B289) - POP BOWL LOCATION A290
scenes.summary: Maverick releases flares but it's too late as a missile slams into his engine, creating a fireball that shreds the rear of his jet.
scenes.turningPointNote: Maverick is shot down while saving Rooster, fundamentally changing the mission dynamics

scenes.heading: INT. ROOSTER'S F-18 - MORNING - RED ROUTE B295
scenes.summary: Rooster calls out Maverick's name.

scenes.heading: EXT. SKIES OVER TARGET VALLEY - MORNING - RED ROUTE C295
scenes.summary: Phoenix and Payback soar higher and see Maverick's flaming plane veer off course below as Phoenix reports over radio that Dagger 1 is hit.

scenes.heading: INT. COMMAND CENTER - USS THEODORE ROOSEVELT - RED ROUTE D295
scenes.summary: Phoenix reports over radio that Dagger 1 is hit and going down as the command center reacts with shock and Hondo reflects on his last moment with Maverick.

scenes.heading: EXT. SKIES AF295
scenes.summary: The remaining jets dive into the valley below the SAMs and their radar, causing the SAM arrays to go still.

scenes.heading: INT. F18S INTERCUT BF295
scenes.summary: Rooster calls for Maverick's status over radio while Payback tells him Maverick is gone and Rooster insists they have to circle back.

scenes.heading: INT. COMMAND CENTER - USS THEODORE ROOSEVELT F295
scenes.summary: Cyclone orders the pilots back to the carrier and refuses to launch search and rescue due to incoming bandits, telling the room that Maverick knew the risk.

scenes.heading: INT. F-18S - INTERCUT G295
scenes.summary: Command orders Dagger Two to return to carrier as Payback warns Rooster about closing bandits, but Phoenix tells Rooster that Maverick is gone.

scenes.heading: 295 EXT. FROZEN LAKE - MORNING 295 295
scenes.summary: Maverick lies sprawled but alive on a frozen lake, still clipped to his scorched parachute, and scrambles to detach it when he hears approaching helicopters.
scenes.turningPointNote: Reveals Maverick survived the crash, setting up the survival/rescue storyline

scenes.heading: EXT. SKIES - MORNING A296
scenes.summary: A menacing Hind helicopter bristling with guns and rockets appears in the skies.

scenes.heading: EXT. FROZEN LAKE - MORNING B296
scenes.summary: Maverick runs across the frozen lake with nowhere to hide as the Hind helicopter opens fire with its rotary cannon, forcing him to take cover behind a fallen tree.

scenes.heading: EXT. HIND POV - MORNING C296
scenes.summary: The helicopter crew searches the ground below from their POV but cannot see Maverick yet.

scenes.heading: 297 EXT. EDGE OF FROZEN LAKE - MORNING 297 297
scenes.summary: Maverick stays pressed behind the tree as the Hind approaches and flies overhead.

scenes.heading: EXT. HIND POV - MORNING A298
scenes.summary: The helicopter crew spots Maverick exposed and a helmeted crewman swivels the gun and charges it, preparing to fire.

scenes.heading: EXT. FROZEN LAKE - MORNING B298
scenes.summary: Maverick leaps up and runs as tracers follow him until the Hind explodes in midair, destroyed by an F-18 that streaks past as Rooster banks and looks down.
scenes.turningPointNote: Rooster disobeys orders and returns to save Maverick, fundamentally changing both characters' arcs

scenes.heading: EXT. MOUNTAINTOP - MORNING A299
scenes.summary: A radar-guided missile launcher swivels and fires a SAM traveling at Mach 5.

scenes.heading: EXT. SKIES OVER MOUNTAINS - MORNING B299
scenes.summary: Rooster throws flares and tries to evade but is hit by the missile.

scenes.heading: INT. COMMAND CENTER - USS THEODORE ROOSEVELT C299
scenes.summary: The command center reports that Dagger Two is hit as Cyclone pounds his fist on the panel.

scenes.heading: INT. PHOENIX'S F-18 D299
scenes.summary: Phoenix waits in vain to hear Rooster's voice as command tries to reach Dagger Two.

scenes.heading: INT. HANGMAN'S F-18 - MORNING E299
scenes.summary: Hangman requests permission to launch and fly air cover but is denied, causing him to hang his head in frustration.

scenes.heading: 299 EXT. FROZEN LAKE - MORNING 299 299
scenes.summary: Maverick sees Rooster's burning F-18 as Rooster ejects, then immediately starts running to track Rooster's parachute path.

scenes.heading: 302 EXT. FORESTED BASE OF RIDGE - MORNING 302 302
scenes.summary: Maverick sprints through the trees in panic, following Rooster's parachute as it disappears among them.

scenes.heading: 303 EXT. FOREST CLEARING - MORNING 303 303
scenes.summary: Maverick finds Rooster burying his parachute and they argue about Rooster's decision to return, with Maverick shoving him and demanding to know why he came back, leading to Rooster shouting that Maverick told him not to think.
scenes.turningPointNote: The central emotional conflict between Maverick and Rooster finally erupts into direct confrontation

scenes.heading: 304 EXT. FOREST RIDGE - HOSTILE COUNTRY - LATER - MORNING 304 304
scenes.summary: Maverick uses a scope to survey the damaged enemy airstrip through the chaos and shows Rooster something that makes Rooster say he's not serious.

scenes.heading: 305 EXT. ENEMY AIRSTRIP - MINUTES LATER - MORNING 305 305
scenes.summary: Maverick scouts the enemy airstrip through heavy smoke and shows Rooster an F-14 Tomcat in a cement bunker, prepped for flight and loaded with missiles.
scenes.turningPointNote: Discovery of the F-14 provides the means for escape, shifting from survival to active escape plan

scenes.heading: 306 EXT. AIRCRAFT BUNKER - MOMENTS LATER - MORNING 306 306
scenes.summary: Maverick and Rooster walk briskly toward the F-14 through the chaos, hoping no one will notice them.

scenes.heading: INT. AIRCRAFT BUNKER - MOMENTS LATER - MORNING A307
scenes.summary: Maverick inspects and successfully starts the start-cart attached to the F-14.

scenes.heading: 307 EXT. AIRCRAFT BUNKER - MOMENTS LATER - MORNING 307 307
scenes.summary: Maverick instructs Rooster on operating the start-cart, but Rooster stops him to confess that Maverick was right to pull his academy papers and thanks him for saving his life.
scenes.turningPointNote: Rooster's admission resolves their central emotional conflict and acknowledges Maverick's protective actions

scenes.heading: 308 EXT. ENEMY AIRSTRIP - MORNING 308 308
scenes.summary: Maverick stops the F-14 on the taxiway and expands the wings while an enemy tank passes them, with Rooster noting that both runways are cratered.

scenes.heading: 310 INT. COMMAND CENTER - USS THEODORE ROOSEVELT - MORNING 310 310
scenes.summary: The command center receives Rooster's ESAT signal showing he's supersonic and airborne, then learns an F-14 Tomcat is heading toward them with two fifth-generation fighters moving to intercept.
scenes.turningPointNote: Reveals Maverick and Rooster successfully escaped and are airborne, but face new aerial threat

scenes.heading: INT. COMMAND CENTER - USS THEODORE ROOSEVELT - MORNING AA313
scenes.summary: A communications tech reports to the command center that the F-14 has engaged enemy aircraft and shot down one bandit, causing some crew members to cheer while Cyclone, Warlock and Hondo remain stoic.

scenes.heading: EXT. SKIES/INT. F-14 BB313
scenes.summary: A fifth-generation enemy fighter fires a missile at the F-14 as Rooster calls out the threat and Maverick orders him to hit the flares while deploying the emergency wing spread to climb vertically.

scenes.heading: EXT. SKIES CC313
scenes.summary: The enemy fifth-generation fighter performs an unprecedented maneuver, using thrust vectors to fly vertical and loop around its own missile.

scenes.heading: INT. F-14/EXT. SKIES INTERCUT DD313
scenes.summary: Rooster reacts with shock to the enemy's impossible maneuver while Maverick executes a pirouette at full power to get behind the fifth-gen fighter and fires a missile.

scenes.heading: INT. CANYON EE313
scenes.summary: Maverick fires guns at the fifth-generation fighter in a close-range canyon chase as Rooster calls out obstacles and the enemy aircraft evades through severe G-force maneuvers.

scenes.heading: INT. COMMAND CENTER - USS THEODORE ROOSEVELT - MORNING A313
scenes.summary: Maverick radios the command center identifying as Ghostrider, reporting they have captured an enemy Tomcat and splashed two bandits, stunning Cyclone and Warlock while Hondo smiles.
scenes.turningPointNote: Mission success confirmed - Maverick and Rooster have survived and are returning

scenes.heading: EXT. SKIES - MORNING B313
scenes.summary: The F-14 transitions from flying over mountains to flying over the ocean.

scenes.heading: 313 INT. F-14 - CONTINUOUS - MORNING 313 313
scenes.summary: Maverick tells Rooster they must eject because they can't outrun their pursuer, but when Maverick orders ejection, Rooster's ejection handle doesn't work, leaving them trapped as the enemy fighter attacks.
scenes.turningPointNote: Ejection system failure traps both characters in mortal danger with no escape

scenes.heading: 314 INT. HANGMAN’S F-18 - MORNING 314 314
scenes.summary: Hangman announces over radio that he is their savior and tells them to prepare for landing.

scenes.heading: 315 INT. F-14 - MORNING 315 315
scenes.summary: Rooster greets Hangman saying he looks good, Hangman responds confidently, and Maverick and Rooster watch as Hangman's F-18 performs a victory roll.

scenes.heading: 316 INT. COMMAND CENTER - USS THEODORE ROOSEVELT - MORNING 316 316
scenes.summary: Cyclone orders Hangman to land first because Maverick may burn the deck, and Hondo realizes something important and runs from the command center.

scenes.heading: 317 EXT. DECK - USS THEODORE ROOSEVELT - MORNING 317 317
scenes.summary: Hondo emerges on deck and urgently orders the crew to prepare barricade stanchions, revealing that Maverick doesn't have a tailhook, causing the crew to scramble.

scenes.heading: 318 INT. BRIDGE - USS THEODORE ROOSEVELT - MORNING 318 318
scenes.summary: Hangman's F-18 successfully lands with its tail hook while hundreds of sailors work to remove trap-wires and raise a massive nylon barricade net for Maverick's approach.

scenes.heading: INT. BRIDGE/F-14 - MORNING A320
scenes.summary: Maverick gets a familiar glimmer in his eye and radios a request for a tower fly-by, leaving Cyclone and Warlock wondering if he's joking.

scenes.heading: INT. F-14 B320
scenes.summary: Rooster questions Maverick's timing for a fly-by, and Maverick responds that it could be their last one before continuing his radio request.

scenes.heading: INT. BRIDGE - MORNING C320
scenes.summary: Cyclone takes the radio and orders Maverick to land the aircraft immediately while Maverick's response comes through as broken static.

scenes.heading: INT. F-14 D320
scenes.summary: Maverick speaks in broken, garbled radio transmission, pretending he can't hear clearly.

scenes.heading: 320 INT. BRIDGE - USS THEODORE ROOSEVELT - MORNING 320 320
scenes.summary: Cyclone questions if Maverick even wants to land, Warlock notes that asking permission is progress, and Cyclone begrudgingly authorizes the fly-by.

scenes.heading: INT. F-14 A321
scenes.summary: Maverick expresses surprise at getting permission while Rooster knocks his helmet on the canopy and questions why he bothered saving Maverick.

scenes.heading: INT. BRIDGE - USS THEODORE ROOSEVELT - MORNING B321
scenes.summary: Maverick flies by the tower at high speed, rocking it, while Cyclone shakes his head in response.

scenes.heading: EXT./INT. F-14 - NEARING USS THEODORE R - MORNING C321
scenes.summary: Maverick discovers they have no nose gear, discusses the risks of ejecting with potentially old parachutes versus staying with the plane, with Rooster choosing to stay.

scenes.heading: 321 EXT. DECK - USS THEODORE ROOSEVELT - MOMENTS LATER - MORNING 321 321
scenes.summary: Maverick reports no hook, no nose gear, then an engine fails as he approaches for landing, with the LSO calling for power cuts as everything goes silent.

scenes.heading: 322 EXT. DECK - USS THEODORE ROOSEVELT - MORNING 322 322
scenes.summary: The damaged Tomcat crashes onto the carrier deck, sliding on its nose while showering sparks and spewing smoke until it slams into the nylon net and stops.

scenes.heading: 323 EXT. DECK - MOMENTS LATER - MORNING 323 323
scenes.summary: Emergency crews rush the crashed jet as Maverick and Rooster climb out safely, reunite with their team including Hondo, and receive acknowledgment from Cyclone while the crew celebrates.
scenes.turningPointNote: Safe return and reunion - the mission crisis is fully resolved

scenes.heading: 324 EXT. DECK - USS THEODORE ROOSEVELT - MORNING 324 324
scenes.summary: The entire ship celebrates the mission's success as Maverick joins Rooster and Hangman in laughter and embraces, with all of them finally united as allies.

scenes.heading: EXT. HARD DECK - LATE AFTERNOON A327
scenes.summary: Establishing shot of the Hard Deck bar in late afternoon.

scenes.heading: INT. HARD DECK - LATE AFTERNOON B327
scenes.summary: Maverick enters the nearly empty Hard Deck looking for Penny, learns from the bartender that she and Amelia went sailing indefinitely, then goes to his hangar where he adds a photo from the Roosevelt to his wall of memories.

scenes.heading: 328 INT. P-51 - DAY 328 328
scenes.summary: Maverick flies his P-51 with Penny in the back seat, giving her safety instructions while she teases him about the plane's age and expresses skepticism about his reassurances.

scenes.heading: 329 EXT. P-51 329 329
scenes.summary: The P-51 banks away with Penny screaming and laughing as Maverick calls out a sailing term before the screen goes black.
